rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.462, which concerns mentalhealth and substance abuse resources for school employees. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The agency, in coordination with the Health and Human Services Commission, shall establish and maintain an Internet website to provide resources for school district or open-enrollment charter school employees regarding working with students with mental health conditions or who engage in substance abuse.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses school employee mental health resources, not property tax exemptions.
